acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, full medical for all injuries.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, all work-related medical treated.** List everything.[1] Key factors: Comprehensive eval. Future surgery ok. Ratings for permanency. Insist on specialists. Attorney prevents lowball.
